channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NCR faces Negros Island Region in 2026 Palarong Pambansa secondary girls’ volleyball final (live coverage)
item.description: The 2026 Palarong Pambansa secondary girls’ volleyball final features a high-stakes showdown between the National Capital Region (NCR) and the Negros Island Region, held in Agusan del Sur on Saturday,...

item.title: Two suspects appear in Dar es Salaam court over cannabis trafficking allegations
item.description: Two individuals have appeared before a Dar es Salaam court on charges linked to transporting cannabis within the city, marking another case in Tanzania’s ongoing crackdown on drug trafficking in its c...

item.title: Reflections on the Justification of War and Civilian Suffering in Ongoing Middle East Conflicts
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on the moral and political language used to justify modern warfare, particularly in the context of ongoing conflicts in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The author argues that the ...

item.title: Kerala Government to Investigate Alleged Security Lapses at Padmanabhaswamy Temple
item.description: Thiruvananthapuram: Kerala Devaswom Minister K Muraleedharan has announced that the state government will conduct a formal investigation into alleged missing valuables and security lapses at the Sree ...

item.title: Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi named Newsmaker of the Year, calls for stronger anti-corruption drive
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal Provincial Commissioner Lieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi has been named Newsmaker of the Year 2025, receiving recognition at the National Press Club in Pretoria. In his acceptance s...

item.title: Government introduces capital gains tax changes affecting retirees and property investors amid ongoing uncertainty
item.description: The federal government has begun introducing legislation to implement the tax measures announced in the May 12 budget, with significant changes proposed to capital gains tax (CGT), negative gearing, a...

item.title: Ojude Oba 2026 highlights seven notable celebrity fashion moments at the festival

item.title: Jalen Williams ruled out of Game 7 as Thunder face Spurs in Western Conference Finals decider
item.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder will be without key guard Jalen Williams for the decisive Game 7 of the Western Conference Finals against the San Antonio Spurs due to a lingering hamstring injury. Williams ...

item.title: US Seeks Stable Strategic Balance with China in Asia, Pentagon Chief Says
item.description: The US Pentagon chief emphasized that the United States aims to maintain a stable equilibrium with China in the Asia-Pacific region. Speaking at the Shangri-La Dialogue, a key security forum in Singap...

item.title: Hurricanes Sweep Canadiens in Eastern Conference Final
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens were decisively defeated by the Carolina Hurricanes in the Eastern Conference final, losing 6-1 in a game that concluded their NHL playoff run for the season. The Hurricanes dom...

item.title: Kayinsola Ajayi breaks Nigerian 100m record with 9.84s and leads 2026 world rankings
item.description: Nigeria has produced a new sprint sensation as 21-year-old Kayinsola Ajayi delivered a breakthrough performance at the NCAA East Regionals, clocking an impressive 9.84 seconds in the men’s 100m race. ...

item.title: Marcia Lucas, Renowned Editor Behind Star Wars, Passes Away at 80
item.description: Marcia Lucas, an influential film editor known for shaping the early Star Wars films, has passed away at the age of 80 after a battle with metastatic cancer. She was married to George Lucas from 1969 ...

item.title: Kenyan Shilling Holds Steady Against US Dollar and Regional Currencies, CBK Reports
item.description: The Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) released its weekly bulletin on May 29, 2026, outlining a broadly stable performance for the Kenyan shilling against both the US dollar and East African Community (EAC)...

item.title: S&P maintains South Africa’s credit ratings with positive outlook amid ongoing fiscal and structural reforms
item.description: S&P Global Ratings has affirmed South Africa’s long-term foreign currency sovereign credit rating at BB and its local currency rating at BB+, while maintaining a positive outlook. The decision reflect...

item.title: Bridal Designer Realizes 12-Year Dream with First Ready-to-Wear Collection
item.description: After 12 long years of dedication and meticulous planning, a Filipino bridal designer has finally launched her highly anticipated ready-to-wear collection. Known for her intricate wedding gowns and at...

item.title: Netanyahu privately expresses concern over potential US-Iran deal under Trump
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has reportedly expressed strong private frustration over the possibility of a US-Iran agreement under former President Donald Trump. Sources close to Netanyah...

item.title: International tribunal finds Canada’s policies constitute ongoing genocide against Indigenous Peoples
item.description: A panel of judges from the Permanent Peoples' Tribunal has issued an interim ruling concluding that current Government of Canada policies amount to an ongoing genocide against Indigenous Peoples. The ...

item.title: Analysis of Trump's Ongoing Washington Projects and Public Spending Concerns
